シラエスが赤子にそうするように、頭をそっと撫でてきた。<br>その優しい手つきに:
Shiraes gently stroked his head as if he were an infant.
Under that tender touch, his eyelids grew heavy.
悪いな、動いてくれたシラエスのほうが<br>疲れてるだろうに……:
Sorry... you were the one doing all the work,
you must be more tired than I am...
私のことは気にするな。<br>君の寝顔をしばらく堪能させてもらおう。:
Don't worry about me.
Let me enjoy watching you sleep for a while.
しばらく、ってどれぐらい――。<br>そう尋ねる前に、意識は眠りに沈んでしまうの:
How long was 'a while,' he wanted to ask — but before the words
could come, consciousness slipped away into sleep...
そして翌日の朝、目が覚めた時。当たり前のように、<br>彼女は<user>の顔を:
And the next morning, when he opened his eyes,
she was there as a matter of course, gazing at %user%'s face.
